name: sandbox-agent

layers.command: RUN |4 NODE_VERSION=24.18.0 GH_VERSION=2.96.0 UV_VERSION=0.11.31 TARGETARCH=amd64 /bin/bash -o pipefail -c apt-get update     && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends         ca-certificates         curl         git         git-lfs         gnupg         jq         less         make         openssh-client         python3         python3-venv         ripgrep         unzip         xz-utils         zip         zstd     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* # buildkit

RUN |4 NODE_VERSION=24.18.0 GH_VERSION=2.96.0 UV_VERSION=0.11.31 TARGETARCH=amd64 /bin/bash -o pipefail -c NODE_ARCH="$(case "${TARGETARCH}" in amd64) echo x64 ;; *) echo "${TARGETARCH}" ;; esac)"     && curl -fsSL "https://nodejs.org/dist/v${NODE_VERSION}/node-v${NODE_VERSION}-linux-${NODE_ARCH}.tar.xz"         | tar -xJ -C /usr/local --strip-components=1 --no-same-owner     && node --version # buildkit

RUN |4 NODE_VERSION=24.18.0 GH_VERSION=2.96.0 UV_VERSION=0.11.31 TARGETARCH=amd64 /bin/bash -o pipefail -c curl -fsSL "https://github.com/cli/cli/releases/download/v${GH_VERSION}/gh_${GH_VERSION}_linux_${TARGETARCH}.tar.gz"         | tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin --strip-components=2 --no-same-owner "gh_${GH_VERSION}_linux_${TARGETARCH}/bin/gh"     && UV_ARCH="$(case "${TARGETARCH}" in amd64) echo x86_64 ;; arm64) echo aarch64 ;; esac)"     && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/astral-sh/uv/releases/download/${UV_VERSION}/uv-${UV_ARCH}-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz"         | tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin --strip-components=1 --no-same-owner     && gh --version     && uv --version # buildkit

RUN |4 NODE_VERSION=24.18.0 GH_VERSION=2.96.0 UV_VERSION=0.11.31 TARGETARCH=amd64 /bin/bash -o pipefail -c groupadd --gid 1001 agent     && useradd --uid 1001 --gid agent --create-home --shell /bin/bash agent     && mkdir /workspace     && chown agent:agent /workspace # buildkit

RUN |4 NODE_VERSION=24.18.0 GH_VERSION=2.96.0 UV_VERSION=0.11.31 TARGETARCH=arm64 /bin/bash -o pipefail -c apt-get update     && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends         ca-certificates         curl         git         git-lfs         gnupg         jq         less         make         openssh-client         python3         python3-venv         ripgrep         unzip         xz-utils         zip         zstd     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* # buildkit

RUN |4 NODE_VERSION=24.18.0 GH_VERSION=2.96.0 UV_VERSION=0.11.31 TARGETARCH=arm64 /bin/bash -o pipefail -c NODE_ARCH="$(case "${TARGETARCH}" in amd64) echo x64 ;; *) echo "${TARGETARCH}" ;; esac)"     && curl -fsSL "https://nodejs.org/dist/v${NODE_VERSION}/node-v${NODE_VERSION}-linux-${NODE_ARCH}.tar.xz"         | tar -xJ -C /usr/local --strip-components=1 --no-same-owner     && node --version # buildkit

RUN |4 NODE_VERSION=24.18.0 GH_VERSION=2.96.0 UV_VERSION=0.11.31 TARGETARCH=arm64 /bin/bash -o pipefail -c curl -fsSL "https://github.com/cli/cli/releases/download/v${GH_VERSION}/gh_${GH_VERSION}_linux_${TARGETARCH}.tar.gz"         | tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin --strip-components=2 --no-same-owner "gh_${GH_VERSION}_linux_${TARGETARCH}/bin/gh"     && UV_ARCH="$(case "${TARGETARCH}" in amd64) echo x86_64 ;; arm64) echo aarch64 ;; esac)"     && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/astral-sh/uv/releases/download/${UV_VERSION}/uv-${UV_ARCH}-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz"         | tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin --strip-components=1 --no-same-owner     && gh --version     && uv --version # buildkit

RUN |4 NODE_VERSION=24.18.0 GH_VERSION=2.96.0 UV_VERSION=0.11.31 TARGETARCH=arm64 /bin/bash -o pipefail -c groupadd --gid 1001 agent     && useradd --uid 1001 --gid agent --create-home --shell /bin/bash agent     && mkdir /workspace     && chown agent:agent /workspace # buildkit

description: Rootless base image for sandboxed coding agents
